# Daniel Jimenez — Desarrollador de Videojuegos y Programador / Video Game Developer & Programmer

> 6+ años creando juegos con IA avanzada en Unity y Unreal
> 6+ years building smart AI-driven games in Unity & Unreal

## Links
- Portfolio: https://dannizj.github.io/portafolio
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dannizj/
- CV: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1D9dfTLyvQxXC3Jz1TJuhaALPU7n1nWiq/view?usp=drive_link
- Email: dannizj03@gmail.com

## About
- Experience: 6 years
- Location: Remote / Latam
- Availability: Available for hire

### Bio (EN)
I'm a video game developer with 6 years of experience programming gameplay and AI. I specialize in AI systems (GOAP, behaviour trees, pathfinding, perception) and building polished experiences in Unity and Unreal Engine. I've taken projects from prototype to playable build, including multiplayer and VR.

### Bio (ES)
Soy desarrollador de videojuegos con 6 años de experiencia programando gameplay e IA. Me especializo en sistemas de IA (GOAP, árboles de comportamiento, pathfinding, percepción) y en construir experiencias pulidas en Unity y Unreal Engine. He llevado proyectos desde el prototipo hasta build jugable, incluyendo multijugador y VR.

## Skills
Unity, C#, Unreal Engine, C++, AI, GOAP, Behaviour Trees, Pathfinding, Perception Systems, Multiplayer, Photon PUN2, VR, Gameplay Programming

## Projects (11)

### Dead Race / Dead Race
- Engine: Unity
- Language: C#
- Tags: Game Developer, Programmer, AI, Unity, C#
- Description (EN): Racing game with advanced AI, smart enemies and tactical planning.
- Description (ES): Carrera con IA avanzada, enemigos inteligentes y planificación táctica.
- Tools: Unity, C#, AI, GOAP, Behaviour Trees, Pathfinding, Perception
- Video: https://youtu.be/nYdjjkVWmeQ
